title: Ekirlin 17cm Flower Plant Pot Indoor - Grey Cement Garden Planter Concrete Planter with Drain Hole Saucer, Modern Succulents Containers for Home Decor, Office & Outdoor

Modern Minimalist Style: The unique cement flower pot makes your space full of artistic sense. Manufactured through appropriate synergy between traditional manual techniques and ergonomics.
Extensive Uses: This cement flower pot is available in five different sizes, 3.5 in, 4 in , 5 in, 6 in and 9 in, making it easy to choose the right home for your plant.
Assured to Buy: If you have any questions or questions, please feel free to contact us, our dedicated customer support team is always at your service.
